---
title: "The Poetical Works of the Rev. George Crabbe, with his Letters and Journals, and his Life ed. his son"
---

## The Poetical Works of the Rev. George Crabbe, with his Letters and Journals, and his Life ed. his son

**Author:** The Rev. George Crabbe
**Date:** 1834
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
